root_cause: runner-aider omitted RUNTIME_BASE=python-runtime-base while its Dockerfile branch runs pip3 install aider-chat.

red_verifier.message: runner-aider must select python-runtime-base for pip-based installation

remediation: deploy/dev/docker-compose.runners.yml now passes RUNTIME_BASE: python-runtime-base for runner-aider.
docker/agent-runtime/contract_test.sh now rejects a future omission.

green_verifiers.command: docker compose --env-file deploy/dev/.env -f deploy/dev/docker-compose.yml -f deploy/dev/docker-compose.runners.yml -p agentcloud-codex-loop-blockly-mvp config --quiet

support_conclusion: The static build root cause is fixed, but no image, Runner, API, browser, or lifecycle support claim follows from this evidence.
external_blocker: An unrelated Buildx build remains active in another worktree; the prior local Aider build request never reached a Dockerfile layer.
